# Strides Therapeutic Services

> BCBA-owned autism and behavioral healthcare clinic in Vancouver, WA, serving Clark County and the Portland, OR metro. Services: ABA therapy (clinic, home, school, community), autism diagnostic assessments for children up to age 8 (starting at $795, results in as little as two weeks, EarliPoint(TM) eye-tracking + MD/PsyD/BCBA team), Washington DDA services, Oregon DDS services, consultation and training, social groups and community respite. Accepted insurance: PacificSource, BlueCross BlueShield, Aetna, Cigna, UnitedHealthcare, Kaiser Permanente, TRICARE, plus WA DSHS-DDA and Oregon DHS-DDS funding. Phone: (360) 622-2253. Address: 204 SE Stonemill Drive, STE 270, Vancouver, WA 98684.

## Services
- [ABA Therapy](https://www.stridestherapeutics.com/services/aba-therapy): Individualized ABA across clinic, home, school, and community settings
- [Autism Diagnostic Assessments](https://www.stridestherapeutics.com/services/autism-diagnostic-assessments): Evaluations for children up to age 8, starting at $795, results in as little as 2 weeks
- [WA DDA Services](https://www.stridestherapeutics.com/services/wa-dda): Behavior support, crisis stabilization, and life skills for Washington DDA clients
- [Oregon DDS Services](https://www.stridestherapeutics.com/services/or-dds): Behavior consultation and positive behavior support plans for Oregon DDS clients
- [Social Groups & Respite](https://www.stridestherapeutics.com/services/social-groups-respite): Skill-building groups and community respite

## Locations
- [Vancouver, WA](https://www.stridestherapeutics.com/locations/vancouver-wa): Clinic + services across Clark County
- [Portland, OR](https://www.stridestherapeutics.com/locations/portland-or): Home-, school-, and community-based services in the Portland metro
- [Autism Evaluation Vancouver](https://www.stridestherapeutics.com/autism-evaluation-vancouver-wa): Fast-track diagnostic evaluations
- [Autism Testing Portland](https://www.stridestherapeutics.com/autism-evaluation-portland-or): Evaluations for Oregon families

## About
- [Our Team](https://www.stridestherapeutics.com/team): Board Certified Behavior Analysts, founders Hannah Schmidt and Elsie Herring
- [Insurance & Funding](https://www.stridestherapeutics.com/insurance): Accepted plans and funding programs
- [Contact](https://www.stridestherapeutics.com/contact): Intake and scheduling
